description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: bridge to securely move assets between Ethereum Mainnet and Solana, as well as to provide governance controls for Sky-issued tokens on Solana. Additional details regarding the Solana
Bridge will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas.
description: Adds documentation for the Avalanche SkyLink Bridge, specifying Freezer Multisig configuration, Rate Limits, and Validator parameters.

diff: Sky uses a SkyLink bridge to securely move assets between Ethereum Mainnet and Solana, as well as to provide governance controls for Sky-issued tokens on
SkyLink Bridge will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas
description: Updates the Solana SkyLink Bridge documents to reflect the completed November 2025 deployment phases and removes outdated forward-looking language.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
